}

  img.classList.remove('monogram__hider');

It’s very useful for monitoring systems, identifying issues, and building dashboards for real-time insights. The flexibility in creating custom queries and visualizations is a big advantage <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What do you dislike about Splunk Enterprise?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">One of the main drawbacks is the cost, especially as data ingestion increases. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section></div><div class="elv-flex elv-flex-col js-log-click" data-controller="elv--accordion--show-more-controller" data-event-options="{"product_id":2965,"product_uuid":"816c5e8d-f2b2-4bb4-ae29-d981bbeca7aa","product":"Splunk Enterprise","vendor_id":262,"product_type":"Software","name":"Event::Products::Reviews::ReadMore"}" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-more-text-value="Show More" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-less-text-value="Show Less" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-open-value="false" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="container" elv="true"><div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="show-more-trigger-36be3c02" class="elv-overflow-y-hidden elv-h-0" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="panel" id="show-more-panel-60aa3577" role="region"><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-normal elv-text-subtle elv-pb-3" elv="true"><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What problems is Splunk Enterprise solving and how is that benefiting you?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise helps solve the problem of dealing with large volumes of log data coming from different systems. Without it, troubleshooting and monitoring can be time-consuming because the data is scattered. With Splunk, it becomes easier to centralize logs, search through them quickly, and identify issues in real time. <div class="elv-pl-1 elv-inline-flex elv-justify-center elv-items-center" elv="true"><div class="elv-text-center elv-justify-center elv-leading-none"><label class="elv-tracking-normal elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-semibold elv-text-subtle" elv="true">4/5</label></div><div class="elv-text-center elv-justify-center elv-leading-none elv-ml-1"></div></div></div></div><div class="elv-flex elv-flex-col elv-gap-y-3" itemprop="reviewBody"><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What do you like best about Splunk Enterprise?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise stands out because it makes it easy to collect data from endpoints at scale. It can pull in logs, events, and machine data from many different systems, then centralize that information so it is searchable and useful. That makes troubleshooting, monitoring, and security investigations much faster, because the data is already in one place instead of scattered across servers and devices. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What do you dislike about Splunk Enterprise?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise can be expensive, and at times it feels like you don’t have enough control over your own data. Running into licensing limits is also frustrating, especially when data volume grows unexpectedly and starts impacting visibility or how the platform can be used. Another concern is that vulnerabilities in Windows collectors can add extra security risk and increase ongoing maintenance overhead. Taken together, these issues can make the platform feel restrictive, costly, and more difficult to manage than it should be. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section></div><div class="elv-flex elv-flex-col js-log-click" data-controller="elv--accordion--show-more-controller" data-event-options="{"product_id":2965,"product_uuid":"816c5e8d-f2b2-4bb4-ae29-d981bbeca7aa","product":"Splunk Enterprise","vendor_id":262,"product_type":"Software","name":"Event::Products::Reviews::ReadMore"}" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-more-text-value="Show More" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-less-text-value="Show Less" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-open-value="false" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="container" elv="true"><div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="show-more-trigger-e422a30c" class="elv-overflow-y-hidden elv-h-0" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="panel" id="show-more-panel-fac24080" role="region"><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-normal elv-text-subtle elv-pb-3" elv="true"><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What problems is Splunk Enterprise solving and how is that benefiting you?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise is helping us solve endpoint and infrastructure data tracking across multiple systems. Before using it, it was harder to pull together logs and machine data from different endpoints in one place, which made troubleshooting, monitoring, and investigating issues slower and more manual. Now we can collect and search that data centrally, which gives us better visibility into system activity and helps us identify problems faster. This has improved incident response, made tracking issues across environments easier, and reduced the time spent manually gathering data from different sources. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section></div></div><button data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="trigger" data-action="" data-login-redirect="https://www.g2.com/products/splunk-enterprise/reviews?expanded=splunk-enterprise-review-6749798#splunk-enterprise-review-6749798" data-login-modal-toggle-allow-untrusted-user="true" data-event-click-target="product#review_read_more" data-turbo="false" aria_controls="show-more-panel-fac24080" class="btn btn--md btn--text elv-w-fit" ue="login-modal-toggle" elv="true" type="button"><div class="elv-flex elv-items-center" data-elv--button-controller-target="textContent"><span><span class="elv-cursor-pointer" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="triggerText">Show More</span></span><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" aria-hidden="true" class="icon icon--sm icon--fill-current elv-text-primary" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="icon"><path d="M10 13.0625L5 8.0625L6.0625 7L10 10.9375L13.9375 7L15 8.0625L10 13.0625Z"></path></svg>

</p><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Its versatile visualization tools and massive Splunkbase app ecosystem make it a top choice for centralized security monitoring and high-scale IT operations. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What do you dislike about Splunk Enterprise?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise is often criticized for its complex and expensive licensing based on data volume, which can become unpredictable as your infrastructure grows.
</p><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Users also find its Search Processing Language (SPL) has a steep learning curve, and the platform can be resource-intensive to maintain and scale. <span class="spht">Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.</span></p></section></div><div class="elv-flex elv-flex-col js-log-click" data-controller="elv--accordion--show-more-controller" data-event-options="{"product_id":2965,"product_uuid":"816c5e8d-f2b2-4bb4-ae29-d981bbeca7aa","product":"Splunk Enterprise","vendor_id":262,"product_type":"Software","name":"Event::Products::Reviews::ReadMore"}" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-more-text-value="Show More" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-show-less-text-value="Show Less" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-open-value="false" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="container" elv="true"><div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="show-more-trigger-0c5144b3" class="elv-overflow-y-hidden elv-h-0" data-elv--accordion--show-more-controller-target="panel" id="show-more-panel-4c88e6dd" role="region"><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-normal elv-text-subtle elv-pb-3" elv="true"><section><div class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base elv-font-bold" elv="true">What problems is Splunk Enterprise solving and how is that benefiting you?</div><p class="elv-tracking-normal elv-text-default elv-font-figtree elv-text-base elv-leading-base">Splunk Enterprise solves data fragmentation and visibility gaps by centralizing massive volumes of machine data into a single, searchable platform.
